_comment: country_id -> explicit Wikipedia page title. Countries not listed here are tried with 'List of active {name} military aircraft' then '{name} Air Force'.
usa: List of active United States military aircraft
gbr: List of active United Kingdom military aircraft
srb: Serbian Air Force and Air Defence
tur: List of active Turkish military aircraft
chn: List of active People's Liberation Army aircraft
rus: List of active Russian military aircraft

ita: List of active Italian military aircraft
bih: Armed Forces of Bosnia and Herzegovina
can: List of active Canadian military aircraft
bra: List of active Brazilian military aircraft
irn: Islamic Republic of Iran Air Force
nga: List of active Nigerian military aircraft
zaf: List of active South African military aircraft

tha: List of active Thai military aircraft
vnm: List of aircraft of the Vietnam People's Air Force
